archetype_en.persona_mask: Outer social persona: socialized, restrained, appropriate, adaptive to the external world
archetype_en.shadow_self: Inner shadow self: authentic, hidden, vulnerable, primal instincts
archetype_en.anima_animus: Inner complementary psyche: balancing personality shortcomings, yin-yang harmony
archetype_en.self_essence: Self-integration mode: whole soul, unified personality, inner completeness

archetype_zh.persona_mask: 对外社交人格面具模式：社会化、克制、得体、适配外界
archetype_zh.shadow_self: 内在阴影自我模式：真实、隐秘、脆弱、原始本能
archetype_zh.anima_animus: 内在互补心智模式：平衡性格短板、阴阳调和
archetype_zh.self_essence: 自性整合模式：完整灵魂、人格合一、内心圆满
